goal: Generate ceremonial council and decree visual studies that support institutional authority, canon decisions, and synod-style transitional moments.

visual_requirements.color_notes: dark parchment and leather tones, aged gold, restrained red markers, wax-seal warmth
visual_requirements.composition_notes: one central decree or title element, supporting seal or ribbon detail, strong contrast between field and inscription
must_include: seal, ribbon, or council insignia language

text_inputs.primary_text: Replace with council or decree title.
text_inputs.secondary_text: Optional date, location, or doctrinal line.

review_checks: Matches decree and seal assets already in the kits
destination_after_approval: visual-library/02-series-kits/episode-neutral/ or visual-library/02-series-kits/frame-elements/ depending on whether the surviving output is a full plate or modular detail.
run_notes: Best paired with image-generation-template.md. Keep only versions that feel disciplined and reusable.
